arts.ttl: 'Robotic, A genius with people, Loved head tennis, Didn't stand a chance': Neil Allen's honest opinion on his 17 Portsmouth bosses - Part 2
arts.sum: Last week, chief sports writer Neil Allen marked 1,000 games covering Pompey for The News - but what of the managers he worked with during that time?

arts.ttl: ‘The likes of QPR, Oxford and Plymouth’: Portsmouth boss heeds survival warning from Championship rivals
arts.sum: John Mousinho has dismissed lowering his survival sights as Pompey charge towards Championship safety.

arts.ttl: QPR could land big double injury boost for Portsmouth tie as Marti Cifuentes shares new update
arts.sum: QPR boss Marti Cifuentes has said Karamoko Dembele and Lucas Andersen could both be in contention for this… The post QPR could land big double injury boost for Portsmouth tie as Marti Cifuentes shares new update appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: How Portsmouth boss plans to deal with loss of top scorer against QPR, Plymouth, Leeds United & Co
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes Pompey can share the load when it comes to replacing Callum Lang’s goal threat.

arts.ttl: Stockport County star sends message of support to former Portsmouth teammate after season-ending injury
arts.sum: Pompey were dealt the devastating news that they would be without their star man for the remainder of the season.
